ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the data was collected */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total recoveries */,
  "stage_confirmed" INTEGER /* Confirmed cases in the current stage */,
  "stage_deaths" INTEGER /* Deaths in the current stage */,
  "stage_recovered" INTEGER /* Recoveries in the current stage */,
  "stage_treated_percent" REAL /* Percentage of treated cases in the current stage */,
  "stage_deaths_percent" REAL /* Percentage of deaths in the current stage */,
  "stage_recovered_percent" REAL /* Percentage of recoveries in the current stage */,
  "stage_treated" INTEGER /* Treated cases in the current stage */,
  "recovered_change" REAL /* Change in recovered cases from the previous stage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region belongs to */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the region (e.g., high, middle, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the subregion belongs to */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the subregion */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the subregion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the stage belongs to */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subregion the stage belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "index" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_index FOREIGN KEY ("index") REFERENCES covid_data ("index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_data" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment data entry */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the treatment data belongs to */,
  "treated" INTEGER /* Number of treated cases */,
  "treated_percent" REAL /* Percentage of treated cases */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., hospitalization, medication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_data_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_data" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death data entry */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the death data belongs to */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "deaths_percent" REAL /* Percentage of deaths */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death (e.g., COVID-19, other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_data_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_data" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery data entry */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the recovery data belongs to */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "recovered_percent" REAL /* Percentage of recoveries */,
  "recovered_change" REAL /* Change in recoveries from the previous stage */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Average recovery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_data_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, NGO) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "index" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., addition, modification, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the data was accessed on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
